business.name: Shock-It Electric
business.tagline: Fort Myers electrical work done right

hero.headline: *When the power goes out*, Fort Myers calls us
hero.subheadline: Ashley and his crew handle everything from complete rewiring to that one outlet that's been acting up for months.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, every outlet, every panel
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to complete home rewiring — we handle it all

services.title: Complete Home Rewiring
services.description: Bringing older Fort Myers homes up to code with safe, modern electrical systems that last decades.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.description: When your breaker box can't handle modern demands, we upgrade it to keep your power flowing smoothly.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: From safety lighting to comfort upgrades — we recommend and install fixtures that actually make sense.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.description: Power problems don't wait for business hours. Neither do we — call and we'll be there fast.

about.heading: Ashley and the crew at Shock-It Electric
about.body: We've been handling Fort Myers electrical work for years, building a reputation one satisfied customer at a time. From complete rewiring projects to quick repairs, we show up when we say we will and get the job done right. Our customers stick with us — some for over 6 years — because we answer our phone, arrive fast, and fix it properly the first time.

reviews.name: Stephen A.
reviews.text: Been using Shock-It for over 6 years. Ashley and Brad rewired our whole house and installed lighting upgrades — flawless work every time.

reviews.name: Irene R.
reviews.text: Called Ashley and within 15 minutes he was at my door, identified the major issue immediately. His expertise made my family feel safe again.

reviews.name: Ryan R.
reviews.text: This is my fifth time using them. Large projects, small repairs — Ashley is always responsive and knows his stuff. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Gordon N.
reviews.text: Called Friday, he responded over the weekend, sent his tech Tuesday morning. Complete satisfaction — this is how business should be done.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Southwest Florida
service_areas.subheading: Fast electrical service throughout the Fort Myers area

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical issue sorted?
cta.body: Call Ashley directly at (239) 229-1828 or request your free estimate online. We respond fast and fix it right.
